title: Form Table
caption: The project begins on paper, where identity is filed and distorted.

title: The Form Is the Antagonist
caption: The state writes fiction onto displaced bodies and calls it procedure.

title: Visa for Skin
caption: Identity is processed as surface, category, and permission.

title: Fee Schedule for Speech
caption: Speech becomes something rationed, taxed, and conditionally permitted.

title: Negative Database
caption: Absence is mapped through the records that fail to contain it.

title: Composite Tongue
caption: Arabic, Armenian, English, and administrative registers meet without resolving into a single authorized voice.

title: Stamp / Ledger / Redaction
caption: The clinical surface carries the emotional violence.

title: Void Map
caption: The void becomes legible only through strict mapping.

title: Administrative Fiction Engine
caption: The project uses procedure to expose what procedure erases.

title: Paper / Interface
caption: Any digital edition must preserve the authority, delay, repetition, and obstruction carried by the printed forms.

title: Relation to SIWUE / SparrowOS
caption: The forms become rooms, surveillance files, and temporal debt systems.

title: Filed but Not Resolved
caption: The record remains open because the injury remains unresolved.
